what does e3 and oe mean?
3 dupes, 7 dupes
Enlightenment 3, overexalt

E3 is essentially an additional 3 Copies that you aim for after an obtaining a Character, each 1 is capable of enhancing them in some sort of way. Such as giving additional mechanics to Skills like "Resonance" to base Strike / Defense (Xu) or Realm Mechanics such as raising Embryo Fusion (Thais). Whereas OE or (OverExalt) is an enhanced Exalt granted to an Awakener after obtaining 7 additional Copies of them, in the case of Lotan she gains the Ability to also deal 15% of a Target's maximum Health as additional Damage
